case_title: MAHONEY, DANIEL VS MATE SIMICH INTERIOR-EXTERIOR PAINTING

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-08-2004, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-05-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE.
PER ORDR OF COMM, HEARING DATE ON MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION TO BE SCHEDULED ON 5-16-05 @ 3:30 PM. COPY OF ORDER MAILED TO BOTH PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAHONEY, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATE SIMICH INTERIOR-EXTERIOR PAINTING $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $827.00, MOTION TO VACATE GRANTED BY AGREEMENT OF PLFT AND DEFT. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAHONEY, DANIEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MATE SIMICH INTERIOR-EXTERIOR PAINTING PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUSTAIN THEIR BURDEN OF PROOF THAT THE DEFENDANT'S ACTION CAUSED THE DRY ROT DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S HOUSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAHONEY, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATE SIMICH INTERIOR-EXTERIOR PAINTING $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,077.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
